description:
Backlog anchor: `packages/pi-om-extension/docs/mastra-parity-backlog.md` → **Tier 2 / section 7. Reflection robustness and retry ladder**.

Goal: detect empty, malformed, or obviously lossy reflector output before it replaces useful observations.

Relevant code paths:
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/engine.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/agents.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/prompts.ts`
- `packages/pi-om-extension/src/types.ts`

Worker notes:
- catch practical failure modes such as lost current task, collapsed chronology, dropped completion markers, or vanished constraints
- keep the checks pragmatic and testable; this does not need a heavyweight validation framework
- assume the stronger Tier 1 semantics are now available to validate against
title: Detect degenerate or lossy reflector outputs before they replace useful observations
